panels.description: Displays the count of total problems submitted

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) Total
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (
( `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000

)

panels.title: Problems submitted

panels.description: Displays the count of major problems (high and critical priority are major ones)

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) CountOfMajorProblems
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority` In ('High','Critical')) 
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000

)

panels.title: Major problems

panels.description: Displays the closed known error during the period

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
Count(`PBM:Known Error`.`Known Error ID`) c1
FROM `PBM:Known Error` 
WHERE (
( `PBM:Known Error`.`Known Error ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND `PBM:Known Error`.`Known Error Status` = 'Closed'
AND `PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000

)

panels.title: Closed known errors

panels.description: Displays the number of problems that have change requests associated with them.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
COUNT (DISTINCT
(CASE WHEN (`PBM:Investigation Associations`.`Association Type01` = 'Related to' AND `PBM:Investigation Associations`.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change') THEN `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` END)) As c1
FROM
`AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
INNER JOIN `PBM:Investigation Associations` ON (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` = `PBM:Investigation Associations`.`Request ID02`)
WHERE (
( `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000

)

panels.title: Problem with change requests

renameByName.c1: Number of problems that have change requests associated with them

panels.description: Displays the average problem resolution time in days for all problems closed during the period

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
AVG(DATEDIFF('dd',`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`,`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Last Completed Date`)) AS C1
FROM `PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE 
 `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` In ('Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))

panels.title: Problem resolution time (days)

panels.description: Displays the count of problem investigations closed in the period

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) Total
FROM `PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` In ('Completed','Closed'))

panels.title: Closed problem investigations

panels.description: Displays the count of problems with workarounds that were implemented in this period

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) Total
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (
( `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Temporary Workaround` IS NOT NULL
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000

)

panels.title: Problems with workarounds implemented

panels.description: Top 10 support groups with most no. of problems

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` As SupportGroup,
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) Problems
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND SupportGroup  IS NOT NULL 
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000

GROUP BY SupportGroup
ORDER BY Problems
 LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 support groups with most no. of problems

panels.description: Top 10 services with most no. of problems

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`ServiceCI` As Serivice,
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) Problems
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`ServiceCI` IS NOT NULL
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000

GROUP BY 
Serivice
ORDER BY Problems
 LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 services with most no. of problems

panels.description: Bar chart of problems by impact

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` As Impact,
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) Problems
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND Impact  IS NOT NULL
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000

GROUP BY Impact
ORDER BY Impact
 LIMIT 10

panels.title: Problems by impact

panels.description: Bar chart of problems by problem resolution rate vs workaround rate

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
select t1.SupportGroup,t1.Status,t1.Total,t1.title,t1.Status*100/t1.Total WO from (
SELECT 
COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)*1.00 Total,
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` As SupportGroup,
SUM(CASE WHEN `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Temporary Workaround` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 as Status,
'Workaround' as title
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
group by SupportGroup

union all

SELECT 
COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)*1.00 Total,
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` As SupportGroup,
SUM(CASE WHEN `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Temporary Workaround` IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 as Status,
'Resolution' as title
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
group by SupportGroup
) as t1
group by t1.title,t1.SupportGroup,t1.Status,t1.Total

panels.title: Problem resolution rate vs Workaround rate

panels.description: Problems by submitting trend by days/week/month as per date filter

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   DATE(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`) AS SubmitDate,
   COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`) as NumberofProblems
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000
)
GROUP BY SubmitDate
ORDER BY SubmitDate

panels.title: Problem submitting trend
